Welcome to your new desk, Danilo! This is where you work. Do you like it?
Yes, I like it a lot! There is a big desk and a new laptop.
Great! There are two screens on your desk, so you have more space.
Perfect. And the keyboard is in front of the screens. Where are my pens?
Your pens are in the drawer, under the desk. There is also a shelf behind you.
Nice! There are some books on the shelf. Is there a meeting room near here?
Yes, the meeting room is next to the kitchen. There is a big whiteboard there.
A whiteboard? We can draw our plans on it.
Exactly! Between the meeting room and the window, there is a coffee machine too.
This is a great office. Thank you, Rachel!
There is a laptop on my desk.
There are two screens next to my laptop.
My pens are in the drawer, under the desk.
Is there a meeting room on this floor?
There is a big whiteboard in the meeting room.

Welcome to our office on the fifth floor! Let me show you around. When you come in, there is a big reception desk in front of you. The data team sits on the left, next to the windows. There are two desks for our team, and there is a new laptop on each desk. Behind the desks, there is a tall shelf with books and folders. The meeting room is on the right, between the kitchen and my office. There is a large screen and a whiteboard in the meeting room. We draw our plans on the whiteboard every Monday morning. The kitchen is at the end of the hall, and there is always fresh coffee there. I hope you like your new workplace!
